title: Entitlement Audit and Extension Request
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: VR&E Case Manager / VR&E Officer

Subject: Request for Entitlement Audit and Extension Review
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

I am requesting a written entitlement audit and, if needed, review for extension authority under Chapter 31.

My records show Chapter 33 usage of {{chapter33Used}}, Chapter 31 usage of {{chapter31Used}}, and remaining entitlement listed as {{remainingShown}}.

The training still needed to complete the approved plan is: {{programCompletionGap}}.

Please provide a written accounting of the months used, explain any aggregate-limit calculation being applied, and address whether an extension is available based on the remaining training and rehabilitation objective.

Thank you.

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
